title: Stories & Squads Real Reading

scope.rationale: Touches 6-7 files: two new files (stories.ts service, useStories hook), updates to existing components (StoryWorkspace, SquadsView), backend endpoint implementation.

integration.rationale: Two integrations: filesystem (reading .story.md files) and backend API. No external APIs.

infrastructure.rationale: New backend endpoint /api/stories required. Moderate work: file system read, YAML parsing, filtering logic.

knowledge.rationale: Requires YAML parsing, filesystem operations, and story status inference. Slightly more complex than 3.10. Team familiar with these patterns but non-trivial.

risk.rationale: Low-risk. No data mutations. Dependency: story files must exist and be parseable. Fallback: error handling if files missing.

reasoning: Brownfield enhancement with moderate scope. Backend work (file system + endpoint) is straightforward. Frontend follows established pattern. YAML parsing adds complexity but is standard library operation. Depends on 3.10 for pattern reference.
recommendation: Schedule after 3.10. Same pattern but with backend endpoint. Block on 3.10 approval for pattern consistency.
